creator: olevole@olevole.ru
text:
Created attachment 180750
sysutils/cbsd: update to 11.0.10

* add dependencies for ca_root_nss since base.txz fetched from https://

* Update to 11.0.10

- bhyve: support for e1000 NIC emulation on FreeBSD 11.1+
- jclone,bclone on ZFS system use ZFS clone
- sshkey script has been added to operate with node keys through via script
- (bugfix) jrctl-tui has been rewrited, issue #139
